message:
feat(core): add WAL adapter bridging pager and WAL crates at runtime

WalBackendAdapter wraps WalFile to implement WalBackend (pager→WAL
direction), and CheckpointTargetAdapter wraps CheckpointPageWriter
to implement CheckpointTarget (WAL→pager direction). This completes
the trait-based bridge layer needed for WAL-mode pager operation.

12 new tests covering both adapters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
